summary: Iteration 141: Check-in UX Harmonization verification. All tests PASSED. The prominent header CTA is now unified for both organizer and participant roles. Wording is correct ('Check-in GPS' for physical, 'Effectuer mon check-in' for video). CheckinBlock no longer contains CTA buttons - only post-check-in GPS details. Cancelled appointments correctly show no CTA.

passed_tests.test_1_organizer_prominent_cta: PASS - Organizer sees full-width dark 'Check-in GPS' button in header
passed_tests.test_2_participant_same_cta: PASS - Participant sees SAME full-width dark 'Check-in GPS' button in header (HARMONIZATION SUCCESS)
passed_tests.test_3_wording_physical: PASS - Physical appointment shows 'Check-in GPS' wording
passed_tests.test_4_no_double_cta: PASS - CheckinBlock has no button (CTA only in header)
passed_tests.test_5_cancelled_no_cta: PASS - Cancelled appointment shows no check-in CTA
passed_tests.test_6_page_loads_no_errors: PASS - Appointment detail page loads without JS errors for both roles
passed_tests.test_7_organizer_banners_work: PASS - Organizer banners (guarantee, cancellation) still functional

critical_code_review_comments: AppointmentHeader.js: canCheckin condition correctly removed 'isOrganizer &&' requirement - now any role with accepted_guaranteed status can see CTA
CheckinBlock.js: Correctly refactored to be details-only block (no CTA buttons)
AppointmentDetail.js: Properly computes unified activeCheckinRecord/Done/Data/Handler for both roles (lines 764-769)
Time gating logic (checkinTimeState) correctly prevents CTA from showing for future appointments
context_for_next_testing_agent: Check-in UX harmonization verified. Key appointment for testing: 3e2f572f-e5e8-47a2-9e74-7f4273dd2d7c (RDV Saint-Germain - Cosi). Both organizer and participant see the same prominent header CTA. The 403 console errors when viewing as participant are expected (organizer-only API endpoints). OrganizerCheckinBlock.js was deleted (dead code). Most appointments are in the future so checkinTimeState='before' and no CTA is shown - this is correct behavior.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: Participants had only a small outline button at bottom of page while organizers had prominent header CTA
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: AppointmentHeader.js canCheckin condition no longer requires isOrganizer. CheckinBlock.js refactored to details-only (no CTA). AppointmentDetail.js computes unified check-in props for both roles.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Both organizer and participant now see identical full-width dark 'Check-in GPS' button in header
